## What this does

A short description of the change.

## Type

- [ ] New tool
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Module imports cleanly (`Import-Module ./Tol.PowerShell.psd1 -Force`)
- [ ] Command uses an approved verb and the `Tol` prefix
- [ ] Tool has a folder under `tools/` with a `README.md`
- [ ] Added to `FunctionsToExport` in the manifest (for new commands)
- [ ] Linked from the root README tool table
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
